parents.subject: LU-17076 nrs: wait for RCU completion

commit.subject: LU-16796 ofd: Change struct ldlm_namespace to use refcount_t
commit.message:
LU-16796 ofd: Change struct ldlm_namespace to use refcount_t

This patch changes struct ldlm_namespace to use
refcount_t instead of atomic_t

Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: I775313b3a7b26348a9e3f90c0ff04d167efe3a33
